mapper.insert: insert into event_outbox (event_type, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, payload, status) values (#{eventType}, 'article', #{aggregateId}, #{payload}, 'pending')
insert into event_outbox (event_type, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, payload, status) values (#{eventType}, #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, #{payload}, 'pending')
mapper.select: select * from event_outbox where ( status in ('pending', 'failed') or (status = 'processing' and updated_at < #{staleProcessingBefore}) ) and attempts < 3 order by created_at asc, id asc limit 20
